meta.known_outcome: SAP acquires Reltio to address Business Data Cloud adoption resistance through enhanced external data integration

concepts.name: Actor
concepts.description: Generic actor in the strategic landscape

concepts.name: StrategicActor
concepts.description: Actor capable of making strategic decisions and investments

concepts.name: EnterpriseSoftwareVendor
concepts.description: Company providing large-scale business application software

concepts.name: MasterDataManagementVendor
concepts.description: Company specializing in master data management and data integration solutions

concepts.name: DataPlatformVendor
concepts.description: Company providing data lake, analytics, and AI platform services

concepts.name: UserGroup
concepts.description: Organization representing the interests of software users

concepts.name: Consultancy
concepts.description: Firm providing strategic and implementation advisory services

concepts.name: Customer
concepts.description: Organization that purchases and uses software products

concepts.name: external_data_integration
concepts.description: Capability to harmonize and integrate data from sources outside a vendor's own portfolio

concepts.name: ai_platform_data_context
concepts.description: Capability to provide cleansed, harmonized data with business context for AI applications

concepts.name: master_data_management
concepts.description: Capability to create and maintain a single, trusted view of key business entities (golden records)

concepts.name: cloud_native_mdm
concepts.description: Capability to deliver master data management using cloud-native architectures

concepts.name: market_awareness
concepts.description: Capability to generate familiarity and understanding of a product in the target market

concepts.name: migration_execution
concepts.description: Capability to successfully transition customers from old to new systems

concepts.name: AdoptionResistance
concepts.description: Market constraint where potential customers are unfamiliar with or hesitant to adopt a new product

concepts.name: MidMigrationStalemate
concepts.description: Constraint where customers are stuck during migration, paying for a system they cannot use

concepts.name: DataFragmentation
concepts.description: Constraint where business data is scattered across different systems, platforms, and domains without connection

concepts.name: AcquisitionEvent
concepts.description: Strategic event where one company purchases another

concepts.name: PlatformLaunch
concepts.description: Event where a new software platform or service is introduced to the market

concepts.name: AdoptionBoost
concepts.description: Potential outcome where product adoption increases significantly

concepts.name: SalesDeckHaunting
concepts.description: Negative outcome where a damaging finding persistently undermines sales narratives

concepts.name: PlatformAdoptionGame
concepts.description: Strategic game where vendors compete for platform adoption in a market with high switching costs and integration barriers

concepts.name: OneDomainModel
concepts.description: SAP's strategic construct for creating a common data model across all SAP applications

concepts.name: BusinessDataCloud
concepts.description: SAP's cloud service for building insight apps with analytics and AI on real-time application data

concepts.name: EntityResolutionSystem
concepts.description: AI-based system to find and merge related records into a golden record

relations.name: inherits_from
relations.description: Indicates a subtype relationship between actor types

relations.name: has_capability
relations.description: Vendor possesses the ability to integrate external data

relations.name: has_capability
relations.description: Vendor possesses master data management capabilities

relations.name: has_capability
relations.description: Vendor possesses ability to generate product awareness

relations.name: has_capability
relations.description: Vendor possesses ability to execute customer migrations

relations.name: addresses
relations.description: Capability works to solve the data fragmentation problem

relations.name: addresses
relations.description: Capability works to reduce adoption resistance by providing better data context for AI

relations.name: leads_to
relations.description: Acquisition event may lead to increased adoption

relations.name: causes
relations.description: Migration problems create persistent negative sales narrative

relations.name: competes_with
relations.description: Vendors compete in overlapping platform markets

relations.name: depends_on
relations.description: BDC's success depends on external data integration capability

relations.name: influences
relations.description: User group research findings influence market adoption resistance

relations.name: substitutes
relations.description: MDM capability substitutes for/replaces data fragmentation

axioms.statement: MidMigrationStalemate occurrence severely increases AdoptionResistance and creates SalesDeckHaunting
Acquisition of a MasterDataManagementVendor by an EnterpriseSoftwareVendor transfers external_data_integration and master_data_management capabilities
Enhanced external_data_integration capability reduces DataFragmentation constraint
If market_awareness < 0.2 AND MidMigrationStalemate exists, then AdoptionResistance > 0.8

events.description: Reltio migrated its underlying database from Cassandra to Spanner on Google Cloud.
SAP launched its Business Data Cloud (BDC) service in alliance with Databricks.

Research from DSAG found 83% of its members were only slightly familiar with or not familiar at all with BDC, and that customers stuck mid-migration were paying full cloud fees for an unusable system.
SAP announced its acquisition of master data management and data integration specialist Reltio to integrate non-SAP data into its AI platform and boost BDC adoption.

axioms.statement: cloud_native_mdm enables integration with modern data lakes like Databricks
Migration from Cassandra to Spanner improves data scalability and reliability
SalesDeckHaunting reduces sales_effectiveness by 40% for 12 months
Alliance with DataPlatformVendor (Databricks) reduces adoption_resistance by 0.2
Customer references (Pfizer, Warner Bros) reduce adoption_resistance by 0.15

name: SAP Reltio Acquisition: Overcoming BDC Adoption Resistance
